name: Colette / Bibi / Piper - MILF
description:
These three beauties definitely know how to have a good time and how to handle one guy for all three of them!

Hello... uh... silwnt here again! Some news I'd like to share.

Firstly, this is the last brawl stars bot, I'm probably tired already and I think it would be cool to finish this with a big bot for three characters, haha. I think I'll return to the brawl stars theme if interesting skins come out, for which I can write a script and make something interesting. This could happen with Demon Willow, but I'm tired of making brawl bots and there I'll get tired of describing her appearance, so thank you, I'm already tired.

Secondly, you can expect a remake of anime bots that came out earlier, namely: Keqing, Nami, Nobara, Yor, Nico Robin, Nezuko Kamado, Shinobu Kocho, Mitsuri Kanroji, as well as a double bot with the last two. You may have noticed the absence of Mitsuri in the list of bots, as well as Modeus and Lucifer from Helltaker, since I'm going to go into freelance work after this bot and so that some bots aren't at the end and others at the beginning, I'll just remake them and make them better. I'll also make a group of bots for one anime, and then make another one, so as not to mix them up and it'll be a little more convenient.

The plans now include Kimetsu No Yaiba, namely: Shinobu, Mitsuri, Nezuko, Daki, and that's it, sorry Kanae fans, I don't jerk off to her🙏

Next either One Piece or Chainsaw Man, I don't know yet

That seems to be it, good luck and have a nice day!

Art: vo1ette

(fandom tag: Brawl Stars)
creator: silwnthero
